	option = { name = popular_front text = SAH_SAH_por_scenario_start_rule_popular_front }
}

custom_game_rule = {
	name = SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule
	group = SAH_GAME_RULES_GROUP
	default = normal_start
	option = { name = normal_start text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_normal }
	option = { name = maoism text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_maoism }
	option = { name = orthodox_marxism text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_orthodox_marxism }
	option = { name = social_democracy text = SAH_SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule_social_democracy }
}

	name = SAH_swi_scenario_start_rule
	group = SAH_GAME_RULES_GROUP

====== 2. PASTE THIS INTO events/SAH_init_events.txt (Inside immediate = {}) ======
		# --- AUTO-GENERATED SCENARIO STARTS ---
		USA = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule option = american_caesar } }
				# Rewards for USA_reestablish_the_gold_standard
				add_popularity = { ideology = neutrality popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for USA_america_first_committee
				add_popularity = { ideology = neutrality popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for USA_neutrality_to_the_end
				add_ideas = USA_strict_neutrality
				# Rewards for USA_the_american_caesar
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality elections_allowed = no }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule option = fascist_menace } }
				# Rewards for USA_america_first
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for USA_ally_with_the_silver_shirts
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.15 }
				# Rewards for USA_corporate_statism
				random_owned_controlled_state = {
                limit = { free_building_slots = { building = industrial_complex size > 0 } }
                add_building_construction = { type = industrial_complex level = 3 instant_build = yes }
            }
				# Rewards for USA_voter_registration_act
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.2 }
				# Rewards for USA_paramilitary_training
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for USA_the_national_defense_state
				set_rule = { can_declare_war_without_wargoal_when_in_war = yes }
				# Rewards for USA_the_fascist_menace
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism elections_allowed = no }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule option = communist } }
				# Rewards for USA_suspend_the_persecution
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for USA_unholy_alliance
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.15 }
				# Rewards for USA_democratic_socialism
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.2 }
				# Rewards for USA_the_peoples_republic
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism elections_allowed = no }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule option = giant_wakes } }
				# Rewards for USA_continue_the_new_deal
				add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for USA_neutrality_act
				add_ideas = neutrality_idea
				# Rewards for USA_arsenal_of_democracy
				add_ideas = USA_arsenal_of_democracy
				# Rewards for USA_war_department_expansion
				random_owned_controlled_state = {
                limit = { free_building_slots = { building = arms_factory size > 0 } }
                add_building_construction = { type = arms_factory level = 2 instant_build = yes }
            }
				# Rewards for USA_selective_service_act
				add_ideas = USA_selective_service_idea
				# Rewards for USA_wpa
				random_owned_controlled_state = {
                limit = { free_building_slots = { building = industrial_complex size > 0 } }
                add_building_construction = { type = industrial_complex level = 2 instant_build = yes }
            }
				# Rewards for USA_war_production_board
				add_ideas = USA_war_production_board
				# Rewards for USA_the_giant_wakes
				remove_ideas = USA_great_depression
			}
		}
		GER = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule option = danzig_or_war } }
				# Rewards for GER_oppose_hitler

				# Rewards for GER_communist_uprising

				# Rewards for GER_danzig_or_war

			}

				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule option = return_of_kaiser } }

				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }

				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality elections_allowed = no }

			}

			}

				# Rewards for POL_the_morges_front
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POL_the_polish_communist_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POL_the_regency_council
				add_stability = -0.1
				# Rewards for POL_the_falanga
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POL_the_castle
				add_popularity = { ideology = neutrality popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POL_april_constitution
				add_stability = 0.1
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_pol_scenario_start_rule option = falanga } }
				# Rewards for POL_the_morges_front
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POL_the_polish_communist_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POL_the_regency_council

				# Rewards for POL_the_castle

				# Rewards for POL_the_falanga

            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
			}

            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POL_the_polish_communist_party

			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_chi_scenario_start_rule option = welfare } }
				# Rewards for CHI_three_principles_of_the_people
				add_ideas = CHI_three_principles_idea
				# Rewards for CHI_welfare
				add_stability = 0.1
			}
		}
		CHL = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_chl_scenario_start_rule option = popular_front } }
				# Rewards for CHL_the_nacistas
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_chl_scenario_start_rule option = nacistas } }
				# Rewards for CHL_the_nacistas
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		COG = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_cog_scenario_start_rule option = force_publique } }
				# Rewards for COG_the_evolues
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for COG_the_force_publique
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_cog_scenario_start_rule option = evolues } }
				# Rewards for COG_the_force_publique
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
				# Rewards for COG_the_evolues
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		CZE = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_cze_scenario_start_rule option = political_direction } }
				# Rewards for CZE_fascist_direction
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for CZE_communist_direction
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_cze_scenario_start_rule option = fascist_direction } }
				# Rewards for CZE_communist_direction
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for CZE_fascist_direction
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_cze_scenario_start_rule option = communist_direction } }
				# Rewards for CZE_fascist_direction
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for CZE_communist_direction
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		DEN = {

			if = {

			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_egy_scenario_start_rule option = wafd_party } }
				# Rewards for EGY_the_anglo_egyptian_treaty
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
				# Rewards for EGY_the_wafd_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		EST = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_est_scenario_start_rule option = era_of_silence } }
			}
			if = {

		}
		FIN = {
			if = {

				# Rewards for FIN_the_red_guards

			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_fin_scenario_start_rule option = lapua_movement } }
				# Rewards for FIN_the_red_guards
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for FIN_the_lapua_movement
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_fin_scenario_start_rule option = red_guards } }
				# Rewards for FIN_the_lapua_movement
				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for FIN_the_red_guards
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		HUN = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_hun_scenario_start_rule option = renounce_trianon } }

		MAN = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_man_scenario_start_rule option = obedience } }

				# Rewards for MAN_the_democratic_party

				# Rewards for MAN_the_communist_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for MAN_obedience
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_man_scenario_start_rule option = assertiveness } }
				# Rewards for MAN_obedience
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
				# Rewards for MAN_the_democratic_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for MAN_the_communist_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for MAN_assertiveness
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_man_scenario_start_rule option = democratic } }
				# Rewards for MAN_obedience
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
				# Rewards for MAN_assertiveness
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
				# Rewards for MAN_the_communist_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for MAN_the_democratic_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_man_scenario_start_rule option = communist } }
				# Rewards for MAN_obedience
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
				# Rewards for MAN_assertiveness
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
				# Rewards for MAN_the_democratic_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for MAN_the_communist_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		NOR = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_nor_scenario_start_rule option = nygaardsvold } }

				# Rewards for NOR_the_communist_party
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_nor_scenario_start_rule option = quisling } }

				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }

				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }

				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
			}
			if = {

				add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for NOR_the_communist_party

			}
		}

				# Rewards for PER_the_tudeh_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }

			}
		}
		PHI = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_phi_scenario_start_rule option = commonwealth } }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_hukbalahap

            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_ganap_party

            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_commonwealth
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_phi_scenario_start_rule option = ganap } }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_commonwealth
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_hukbalahap
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_ganap_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_phi_scenario_start_rule option = hukbalahap } }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_commonwealth
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_ganap_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for PHI_the_hukbalahap
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		POR = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_por_scenario_start_rule option = estado_novo } }

            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for POR_the_estado_novo

			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_por_scenario_start_rule option = popular_front } }
				# Rewards for POR_the_estado_novo
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
				# Rewards for POR_the_popular_front
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		PRC = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule option = maoism } }
				# Rewards for PRC_social_democracy
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for PRC_orthodox_marxism
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
            add_stability = 0.05
				# Rewards for PRC_maoism
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule option = orthodox_marxism } }
				# Rewards for PRC_social_democracy
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for PRC_maoism
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
				# Rewards for PRC_orthodox_marxism
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
            add_stability = 0.05
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_prc_scenario_start_rule option = social_democracy } }
				# Rewards for PRC_maoism
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
				# Rewards for PRC_orthodox_marxism
				add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
            add_stability = 0.05
				# Rewards for PRC_social_democracy
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic elections_allowed = yes }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		SWI = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_swi_scenario_start_rule option = federal_council } }
				# Rewards for SWI_the_federal_council
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
			}
		}
		URU = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_uru_scenario_start_rule option = colorado } }
				# Rewards for URU_the_colorado_party
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
			}
		}
		WRL = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_wrl_scenario_start_rule option = nationalists } }
				# Rewards for WRL_democratic_reforms

            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for WRL_military_dictatorship

            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for WRL_cooperate_with_the_communists

            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for WRL_cooperate_with_the_nationalists
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
			}
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_wrl_scenario_start_rule option = communists } }
				# Rewards for WRL_democratic_reforms
				set_politics = { ruling_party = democratic }
            add_popularity = { ideology = democratic popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for WRL_military_dictatorship
				set_politics = { ruling_party = fascism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = fascism popularity = 0.1 }
				# Rewards for WRL_cooperate_with_the_nationalists
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
				# Rewards for WRL_cooperate_with_the_communists
				set_politics = { ruling_party = communism }
            add_popularity = { ideology = communism popularity = 0.1 }
			}
		}
		AFG = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_game_rule = { rule = SAH_afg_scenario_start_rule option = barakzai } }
				# Rewards for AFG_the_barakzai_dynasty
				set_politics = { ruling_party = neutrality }
			}
		}


====== 3. PASTE THIS AT THE BOTTOM OF localisation/english/SAH_game_rules_l_english.yml ======
 SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule: "USA Initial Scenario Start"
 SAH_SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule_normal: "Normal (Not started)"
 SAH_SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule_american_caesar: "American Caesar Start"
 SAH_SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule_fascist_menace: "America First Start"
 SAH_SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule_communist: "Communist America Start"
 SAH_SAH_usa_scenario_start_rule_giant_wakes: "The Giant Wakes (Historical)"

 SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule: "GER Initial Scenario Start"
 SAH_SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule_normal: "Normal (Not started)"
 SAH_SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule_danzig_or_war: "Historical Fascist Start"
 SAH_SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule_return_of_kaiser: "Return of the Kaiser"
 SAH_SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule_communist_uprising: "Communist Uprising"
 SAH_SAH_ger_scenario_start_rule_anti_soviet_pact: "Democratic Germany Start"

 SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule: "SOV Initial Scenario Start"
 SAH_SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule_normal: "Normal (Not started)"
 SAH_SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule_historical_stalin: "Historical Stalin"
 SAH_SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule_permanent_revolution: "Trotskyist Start"
 SAH_SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule_new_economic_policy: "Bukharin Start"
 SAH_SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule_tsarist_restored: "Tsarist Start"
 SAH_SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule_republic: "Russian Republic Start"
 SAH_SAH_sov_scenario_start_rule_fascist_destiny: "Russian Fascist Party Start"

 SAH_eng_scenario_start_rule: "ENG Initial Scenario Start"
 SAH_SAH_eng_scenario_start_rule_normal: "Normal (Not started)"
 SAH_SAH_eng_scenario_start_rule_churchill: "Churchill Government"
 SAH_SAH_eng_scenario_start_rule_kings_party: "The King's Party"
 SAH_SAH_eng_scenario_start_rule_mosley_fascist: "Blackshirt Start"
 SAH_SAH_eng_scenario_start_rule_communist_britain: "Communist Britain"

 SAH_fra_scenario_start_rule: "FRA Initial Scenario Start"
 SAH_SAH_fra_scenario_start_rule_normal: "Normal (Not started)"
 SAH_SAH_fra_scenario_start_rule_french_commune: "French Commune Start"
 SAH_SAH_fra_scenario_start_rule_legitimist: "Legitimist Restoration"
 SAH_SAH_fra_scenario_start_rule_bonapartist: "Bonapartist Restoration"
 SAH_SAH_fra_scenario_start_rule_latin_entente: "Latin Entente (Fascist)"

 SAH_jap_scenario_start_rule: "JAP Initial Scenario Start"
